Staff Mobility

Erasmus+ Staff Mobility activity provides opportunities for the staff to give lecture in higher education institutions that hold the Declaration of Erasmus located in another European Country, with the condition of giving lecture for at least 8 hours in 1 academic year. It provides opportunities for the staff to receive education in any higher education institution that holds the Declaration of Erasmus.
